games.headline: Philadelphia 6, San Diego 4 — Wheeler (W)
games.summary: Despite home runs from M. Machado and J. Merrill, Zack Wheeler’s dominant seven-inning, two-run outing, with eight strikeouts, propelled the Phillies to a 6-4 win over the Padres.

games.headline: New York 2, Cleveland 1 — Headrick (W)
games.summary: Codi Heuer gave up the decisive run for the Guardians in a nail-biting 2-1 loss to the Yankees at Yankee Stadium. T.Grisham contributed two hits for New York, with David Bednar securing the save.

games.headline: Kansas City 8, Minnesota 6 — Strahm (W)
games.summary: A high-scoring slugfest saw the Royals edge the Twins 8-6 at Target Field. C. Jensen’s two RBIs and M. Massey's home run fueled the Royals' offense, while M. Strahm picked up the win and A. Lange earned the save.

games.headline: San Francisco 12, Milwaukee 9 — Hentges (W)
games.summary: The Giants and Brewers traded blows in a high-scoring 12-9 slugfest. C. Schmitt ignited San Francisco's offense with a home run and two RBIs, while J. Lee piled up four hits as the Giants secured the win.

games.headline: Pittsburgh 5, Houston 1 — Jones (W)
games.summary: R.O'Hearn's crucial three-run homer powered the Pirates to a 5-1 victory over the Astros. Jared Jones stifled Houston's offense, allowing no earned runs through five innings, earning the win.

games.headline: Chicago 7, Athletics 6 — Rolison (W)
games.summary: Despite four home runs from Athletics sluggers S.Langeliers (two), T.Soderstrom, and J.Heim, the Cubs held on for a narrow 7-6 victory at Wrigley Field. Ryan Rolison earned the win for the Cubs.

games.headline: Baltimore 8, Boston 2
games.summary: Trevor Rogers delivered a solid start as the Orioles’ offense, led by C. Mayo's three RBIs, powered their way to an 8-2 blowout over the Red Sox. Brayan Bello took the loss after allowing eight runs.

games.headline: Toronto 7, Atlanta 2 — Dallas (W)
games.summary: E. Clement fueled the Blue Jays' offense with three hits, while V.Jr. also collected three base knocks, setting the tone for Toronto's 7-2 victory over the Braves. Chad Dallas secured the win at Truist Park.

games.headline: Arizona 3, Los Angeles 2 — Sewald (W)
games.summary:
The D-backs edged out the Dodgers 3-2 in a tight battle, highlighted by C.Carroll's homer, but it was G.Perdomo's crucial RBI single that broke the deadlock. P.Sewald secured the win, handing T.Scott the loss in a hard-fought game."
